title: vean skills catalog
description: The contract for the productized vean skills catalog (`.agents/skills/catalog.json`) and the frontmatter every `SKILL.md` carries. A skill's CAPABILITY (the method) lives in `.agents/skills/<id>/SKILL.md`; this schema is the metadata index over those files. Validated in `tests/skills-catalog.test.ts`.

$schema.description: Self-reference to this schema, so editors lint the catalog.

skills.description: Every repo-local skill, in stable id order.

entry.description: One catalog row. `id`/`title`/`description` mirror the skill's SKILL.md frontmatter (`name` -> `id`); `path` is the repo-relative SKILL.md; `version` lets a host detect an updated skill.

id.description: Stable skill id; matches the SKILL.md frontmatter `name`. Lowercase kebab.

description.description: The skill's trigger/usage blurb — copied from SKILL.md frontmatter `description`.

version.description: Skill content version (semver). Bump when the method changes materially.

path.description: Repo-relative path to the skill's SKILL.md (the canonical capability file).

surfaces.description: Optional: which product surfaces the skill is most relevant to.

frontmatter.description: The required YAML frontmatter at the top of every `<id>/SKILL.md`. The install/sync flow and host discovery (Claude `.claude/skills`, Codex `~/.agents/skills`, Cursor `.cursor/skills`) all key off `name`.

name.description: The skill id (must equal the catalog `id` and the directory name).

description.description: What the skill does + when to use it (the trigger). One paragraph.
